recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: Renoir
recommendations.overview: In the French Riviera in the summer of 1915, Jean Renoir, son of the Impressionist painter Pierre-Auguste, returns home to convalesce after being wounded in World War I. At his side is Andrée, a young woman who rejuvenates, enchants, and inspires bot

recommendations.title: Family Swap
recommendations.overview: Husband does not understand his wife? Conflict with children? Do you want to be heard and stood in your place? Be afraid of your desires. In this family, everything changed places, including grandmother.

recommendations.title: El man del porno
recommendations.overview: When Carlos Andrés decides that the best way to contribute to his family is to become a porn actor, the only problem is that his girlfriend does not know about his successful career.

recommendations.title: Five
recommendations.overview: A young man paying the rent for himself and his lifelong friends ends up flat-broke and resorts to selling marijuana to pay the bills – only to get caught up in the dangerous world of drugs.

recommendations.title: Queens of the Ring
recommendations.overview: More than anything, 30-year-old Rose longs to be reunited with Mickaël, her estranged 11-year-old son who has been placed with a foster family and blames his mother for their long separation. When she discovers that Mickaël is crazy about wrestling,

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - L’autre c’est moi
recommendations.overview: L'Autre c'est moi est le troisième spectacle de l'humoriste Gad Elmaleh, en 2005.

recommendations.title: The Last Journey
recommendations.overview: The red moon threatens our existence on earth. Our only hope is the enigmatic Paul WR, the most talented astronaut of its generation. But few hours before the start of the mission, Paul disappears.

recommendations.title: Sexual Chronicles of a French Family
recommendations.overview: Three generations of a French family open up about their sexual experiences and desires after young Romain is caught masturbating in his biology class.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.
